page.windowTitle.language_schools_helen_: Helen Doron Language Schools — Hungary | NaviGen
page.metaDescription.language_schools_he: Explore Helen Doron language schools across Hungary. Browse locations, contacts, and social links. Plan your visit with maps and booking.
Find Helen Doron language schools near you. View locations, hours, contacts, and socials.

page.tagline.language_schools_helen_doro: Find Helen Doron language schools in Hungary.
page.metaDescription.pharmacies_hungary_: Explore pharmacies in Budapest, Hungary. Browse locations, contacts, and useful info to plan your visit.
page.metaDescription.pharmacies_hungary: Explore pharmacies across Hungary. Browse locations, contacts, and practical details to plan your visit.
page.metaDescription.pharmacies: Discover pharmacies by city and region. Compare locations and plan your visit.
page.metaDescription.restaurants_hungary: Explore restaurants in Budapest, Hungary. Browse fine dining, local favorites, opening hours, and visitor details.
Explore restaurants across Hungary. View fine dining, local cuisines, locations, and contact details.
page.metaDescription.restaurants: Discover restaurants by category and region. Compare dining options and plan your visit.
page.metaDescription.laboratories_corden: Explore Corden laboratories in Budapest, Hungary. Browse locations, contact details, services, and practical information to plan your visit.
Explore Corden laboratories across Hungary. Browse locations, contact details, and service information to plan your visit.

page.tagline.laboratories_corden_hungary: Find Corden laboratories in Budapest, Hungary.
page.metaDescription.festival_sziget_202: Plan your Sziget 2026 trip to Óbudai-sziget, Budapest — August 11-15. Get maps, travel, and on-site tips to make the most of the Island of Freedom.

view.settings.title: View by settings
dash.state.qr-info-empty: QR Info view will appear here for the selected period.
dash.state.campaigns-empty: QR Campaigns view will appear here for the selected period.
dash.info.click: Shows daily CTA interactions for the selected period.
dash.info.qrinfo: Shows QR scans and redemptions for the selected period.
dash.info.campaigns: Shows campaign performance, including redemptions and customer metrics.
dash.note.qrinfo-retention: QR redemption data is retained for 56 days.
dash.note.campaign-retention: Campaign analytics include activity from the last 56 days.
no.promotions.yet: No active promotions for this page right now.
promotion.title: Promotion Details
promotion.code-note: Each code is valid for one purchase.
promo.qr.wait: The offer is valid for in-store redemption and only when scanned by the cashier.
promotion.redeem-hint: Only tap this when you're ready to pay.
campaign.redeem-button: I'm at the cashier — 🔳 show my code
qr.role.campaign-redeem-desc: Show this QR code to the cashier when paying to redeem your campaign offer.
campaign.redeem-terms: By redeeming, I agree to the offer terms.
qr.role.campaign-redeem-warning: After scanning, wait for confirmation (10–20 seconds).
dash.analytics.header.rating-none: No customer ratings were recorded in this period.
dash.analytics.header.rating-summary: ⭐ {{avg}} ({{count}}) — Average rating {{avg}} from {{count}} review{{plural}} in this period.
dash.analytics.clicks.none: No click events recorded for this period.
dash.analytics.clicks.top: The most-used actions in this period were: {{actions}}.
dash.analytics.qr.none: No QR activity recorded for this period.
dash.analytics.qr.summary: There were {{total}} QR events in this period: {{details}}.
dash.analytics.qr.from-promos: Most QR activity came from promotions, with {{percent}}% of promo QR shown leading to a redemption.
dash.analytics.qr.from-static: Most QR activity came from static scans, with {{percent}}% leading to a redemption.
dash.analytics.qr.invalid: Invalid attempts were {{percent}}% of QR events, which indicates customers mostly use valid codes.
dash.analytics.camp.none: No promotion campaigns active or tracked in this period.
dash.analytics.camp.summary: Promotions were shown {{armed}} times, with {{redemptions}} redemptions in this period.
dash.analytics.camp.compliance: This gives a scan compliance of {{percent}}% for the period.
dash.analytics.camp.invalid: There were {{count}} invalid redemption attempts across all campaigns.
dash.analytics.scan-hint: Many promotions are opened by customers but not scanned at checkout. Please ensure cashiers scan promotion codes when applying discounts.
redeem.confirm.title: Redeem Confirmation
redeem.confirm.question: How smooth did the redeem event go?
redeem.customer.title: Thank you!
redeem.customer.question: How was your redeem experience?
redeem.confirm.hint: Tap one face to confirm the redeem event.
dash.analytics.qa.heading: Quality Assurance Analysis
dash.analytics.qa.no-promo-activity: No promotional QR activity was recorded in this period, so scan discipline and invalid use cannot be evaluated.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-normal: QA: Promo scanning appears within a normal range for this period. Roughly {percent}% of "promo QR shown" events led to a recorded redemption.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-low: ⚠ QA: Scan discipline appears low in this period (≈ {percent}%). Promotions were shown {armed} times, with {redeems} redemptions. Consider reinforcing the in-store process so that cashiers always scan promotion codes at checkout.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-over-100: ⚠ QA: Reported scan discipline is above 100% (≈ {percent}%). This typically indicates that some redemptions in this period originate from promo QR shown outside the selected reporting window.
dash.analytics.qa.invalid-no-attempts: No redemption attempts were recorded in this period, so invalid use cannot be evaluated.
dash.analytics.qa.invalid-elevated: ⚠ QA: Invalid redemption attempts are elevated in this period (≈ {percent}% of {tries} redemption tries). This may indicate repeated use of expired or already-used codes, or attempts outside the valid campaign window.
dash.analytics.qa.invalid-normal: QA: Invalid redemption attempts look normal for this period (≈ {percent}% of {tries} redemption tries).
dash.analytics.qa.cashier-coverage-missi: Cashier confirmation coverage could not be evaluated because there were no recorded redemptions in this period.
dash.analytics.qa.cashier-coverage-low: ⚠ QA: Cashier confirmations cover only about {percent}% of recorded redemptions ({confirmations} of {redeems}). This may indicate that some discounts are applied without completing the full promo QR flow at the register.
dash.analytics.qa.cashier-coverage-ok: QA: Cashier confirmations cover most recorded redemptions (≈ {percent}%, {confirmations} of {redeems}), which is consistent with a healthy scan-and-redeem process.
dash.analytics.qa.customer-coverage-miss: Customer confirmation coverage could not be evaluated because no promo QR was shown in this period.
dash.analytics.qa.customer-coverage-low: ⚠ QA: Customer confirmations are low compared to promo QR shown (≈ {percent}%, {confirmations} from {armed}). This may indicate that promotions are not consistently converted into a completed redeem experience.
dash.analytics.qa.customer-coverage-ok: QA: Customer confirmations are within an expected range for this period (≈ {percent}%, {confirmations} from {armed}).
dash.analytics.qa.unknown: Quality Assurance status could not be fully evaluated for this period.
dash.analytics.qa.scan-borderline: Promo scanning is slightly below the preferred range. Monitoring is recommended.
install.title: Install NaviGen
install.body: To keep NaviGen handy during the event, add it to your home screen from your browser menu.
install.tip: On most devices, look for “Add to Home Screen” or “Install app” in the browser’s menu.

dash.analytics.click.empty: No click events recorded for this period.
dash.analytics.click.most-used: The most-used actions in this period were: {actions}.

dash.analytics.qr.empty: No QR activity recorded for this period.
dash.analytics.qr.summary-intro: There were {total} QR events in this period:
dash.analytics.qr.summary-from-promos: Most QR activity came from promotions, with {percent}% of promo QR shown leading to a redemption.
dash.analytics.qr.summary-from-static: Most QR activity came from static scans, with {percent}% leading to a redemption.
dash.analytics.qr.summary-invalid: Invalid attempts were {percent}% of QR events, which indicates customers mostly use valid codes.
dash.analytics.campaigns.heading: Campaigns
dash.analytics.campaigns.empty: No promotion campaigns active or tracked in this period.
dash.analytics.campaigns.summary: Promotions were shown {armed} times, with {redeems} redemptions in this period.
dash.analytics.campaigns.invalid-summary: There were {invalid} invalid redemption attempts across all campaigns.
dash.analytics.rating.summary: ⭐ {avg} ({count}) — Average rating {avg} from {count} review{plural} in this period.
dash.analytics.rating.none: No customer ratings were recorded in this period.
dash.analytics.mini.empty: No data available for this period.
dash.analytics.rating.summary.singular: ⭐ {avg} (1) — Average rating {avg} from 1 review in this period.
dash.analytics.rating.summary.plural: ⭐ {avg} ({count}) — Average rating {avg} from {count} reviews in this period.
dash.analytics.campaigns.label: Campaign
dash.analytics.qa.scan-missing: Redemptions were recorded without any matching "promo QR shown" events in this reporting window. This usually means that promo QR codes were displayed outside the selected period.
dash.analytics.click.disclaimer: Note: Scan and click counts can vary slightly by device and camera/QR reader behavior outside NaviGen’s control.

bo.pricing.stub: Coming next: the full Pricing & policies page (timelines, ownership rules, courtesy, restore, and examples).
bo.hiw.run.title: Run a campaign · from €69
bo.hiw.run.b1: 🎁 Active promotion — your offer is actively distributed across NaviGen
bo.hiw.run.b2: 📈 Analytics — see how people interact with your business across discovery and engagement
bo.hiw.run.b3: 🔴 Operational control — your business is the active operator for this location during the campaign
bo.hiw.spend.title: How spending works
bo.hiw.spend.sub: When budget is used and when it isn’t.
bo.hiw.spend.b1: • Your campaign budget is fully committed to the campaign period
bo.hiw.spend.b2: • Your campaign runs for the selected period without additional usage fees
bo.hiw.spend.b3: • There are no rolling balances, cash-outs, or follow-up charges
bo.hiw.own.title: Campaign and ownership
bo.hiw.own.b1: 🎁 Campaign — promotion and analytics for 30 days
bo.hiw.own.b2: 🔴 Ownership — exclusive operation for a limited time
bo.hiw.own.note: A campaign starts both. Both end automatically.
bo.hiw.after.title: After your campaign ends
bo.hiw.after.sub: What remains visible and for how long.
bo.hiw.after.b1: • Your location stays visible for a 60-day courtesy period
bo.hiw.after.b2: • Promotion pauses and analytics access stops
bo.hiw.restore.title: Restore access (free)
bo.hiw.restore.sub: Get back on a new device.
bo.hiw.restore.b1: Restore owner access using your Stripe receipt (pi_…) or owner link.
bo.hiw.restore.note: Restore does not start a campaign or extend ownership.
